_metadata.description: Character appearance seed data for G.I. Joe team ARAH vehicles

data.name: F.L.A.K. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab mobile anti-aircraft cannon on a wheeled platform with elevating barrel and swivel mount. Compact field emplacement with a single operator seat.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: H.A.L. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab heavy artillery laser emplacement on a swiveling tripod platform. Features a large forward-mounted laser cannon with targeting scope and single operator seat.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: J.U.M.P. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Silver and olive drab jet pack with dual rear thrusters mounted on a launch platform with command console. One-man personal flight system with hand-grip controls.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Missile Command Headquarters (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab fold-out mobile command center playset with missile launchers, radar dish, and multiple crew stations. Opens from a compact transport mode into a full command base.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: M.M.S. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab tracked mobile missile system with a cluster of four launch tubes on a rotating turret. Small single-operator vehicle with caterpillar treads.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: M.O.B.A.T. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab motorized battle tank with rotating turret, extending battle cannon, and wide caterpillar treads. Features an open commander hatch and mounted secondary machine gun.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: R.A.M. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab rapid-fire motorcycle with saddlebag-mounted missiles and a forward Vulcan gatling cannon. Compact single-rider attack cycle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: V.A.M.P. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab 4x4 jeep with twin .50 caliber machine guns mounted on a roll bar. Open-top design with functional steering wheel, seats one driver with room for a gunner at the mounted weapon.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: A.P.C. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab amphibious personnel carrier with removable top canopy, forward-mounted cannon, and six-wheeled drive. Seats multiple troops in an enclosed rear compartment.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Dragonfly XH-1 (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab twin-engine assault helicopter with dual chin-mounted gun turrets, side-mounted rocket pods, and a tandem two-seat cockpit with bubble canopy.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Falcon Glider (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab lightweight unpowered assault glider with fixed wings, nose-mounted guns, and an open single-seat cockpit. Designed for silent insertion missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Headquarters Command Center (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large olive drab fold-out command center playset with multiple levels, defensive gun positions, radar arrays, and communication equipment. The primary G.I. Joe base of operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Skystriker XP-14F (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: White and gray supersonic combat jet modeled after the F-14 Tomcat with variable-sweep wings, twin engines, under-wing missile pylons, and a single-seat cockpit with ejection capability.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Twin Battle Gun (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab dual-barrel mobile artillery emplacement on a wheeled platform. Features two side-by-side cannons with elevation adjustment and a single gunner seat.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Wolverine (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab tracked armored missile vehicle with a twelve-tube missile launcher array on top and an enclosed driver compartment. Features caterpillar treads and angular armored hull.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Killer W.H.A.L.E. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large gray and blue armored assault hovercraft with twin forward cannons, side-mounted guns, and an inflatable skirt. Seats a driver and multiple crew in an open deck configuration.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: MANTA (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab one-man armed windsurfer with a mast-mounted sail, standing platform, and underslung weaponry. Mail-order exclusive compact watercraft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: S.H.A.R.C. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Blue and gray submersible high-speed attack craft with a streamlined fuselage, forward-mounted torpedoes, and an enclosed single-seat cockpit. Capable of underwater and surface operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sky Hawk (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab one-man VTOL aircraft with twin Thunderclap cannons, air-to-surface rockets, and ducted fan engines for vertical takeoff. Compact open-cockpit design.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Slugger (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab self-propelled cannon with a massive 170mm Howitzer barrel, armored hull, and six-wheeled chassis. Features a removable .30 caliber machine gun and open gunner positions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: V.A.M.P. Mark II (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Tan and brown upgraded 4x4 jeep with missile launcher, removable roof, doors, and desert camouflage paint scheme. Enhanced version of the original VAMP with enclosed cab option.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: A.W.E. Striker (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab open-top 4x4 assault vehicle with a rear-mounted swiveling cannon, roll cage, and aggressive off-road tires. Seats a driver and rear gunner.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Bridge Layer (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab armored vehicle carrying a deployable folding bridge on top. Tracked chassis with an enclosed driver cabin and hydraulic bridge-laying mechanism.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Ferret ATV (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Small olive drab four-wheeled all-terrain reconnaissance vehicle with forward-mounted missiles and a compact cannon. Open single-seat design for rapid scouting missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Silver Mirage (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Silver and chrome motorcycle with an attached sidecar featuring a gun operator position. Equipped with ground-launch missiles, mortar launcher, and streamlined aerodynamic fairings.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Snow Cat (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: White and blue tracked arctic assault vehicle with dual ski-missile launchers, enclosed heated cabin, and wide caterpillar treads for snow travel. Seats a driver and multiple passengers.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Transportable Tactical Battle Platform (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab mobile elevated battle platform with extending legs, spotlight, crane arm, and multiple command positions. Wheeled transport base that raises into a tall observation tower.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: U.S.S. Flagg (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Massive gray aircraft carrier with a full flight deck, island superstructure, radar arrays, defensive gun emplacements, and launch catapults. The largest G.I. Joe playset at over 7 feet long.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Conquest X-30 (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: White and gray forward-swept-wing supersonic fighter jet with twin vertical stabilizers, under-wing missile pylons, nose-mounted cannon, and a single-seat bubble canopy cockpit.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Devilfish (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue high-speed attack boat with twin jet motors, repeater cannons, torpedo launchers, and side-mounted missiles. Low-profile hull for fast water assault operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: H.A.V.O.C. (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large olive drab multi-section articulated assault vehicle with a forward driver cab, rear weapons platform, dual elevated gun turrets, and heavy armored plating. Seats multiple crew members.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: L.C.V. Recon Sled (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Small olive drab motorized low-crawl reconnaissance sled with a transparent canopy and forward-mounted machine guns. Designed for prone-position stealth scouting.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tomahawk (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Large olive drab troop transport helicopter with twin rotors, side-mounted rocket pods, chin gun turret, and sliding cargo doors. Capable of carrying a full squad of troops.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Triple T (ARAH Cartoon)
data.description: Olive drab three-wheeled assault vehicle with a forward driver cab, rear elevated gunner position, and heavy-duty off-road tires. Armed with dual cannons and a battering ram front end.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (Sunbow)

data.name: Buzz Boar (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Small olive drab one-man underground boring vehicle with a forward rotating drill bit and compact tracked chassis. Designed for tunneling and surprise attack missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Coastal Defender (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab shore defense gun emplacement with an elevated swiveling cannon, protective shield, and sandbag-style base. Single-operator coastal artillery position.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Crossfire (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab radio-controlled attack vehicle with six wheels, armored body, forward-mounted guns, and a rear antenna. The first RC-capable G.I. Joe vehicle with 70-foot range.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Defiant (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Massive white and gray space vehicle launch complex with a space shuttle orbiter, crawler gantry, and launch tower. Multi-level playset with crew stations, satellite bay, and booster rockets.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mobile Command Center (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Large olive drab three-section mobile headquarters on a semi-truck chassis. Opens to reveal command stations, weapon racks, detention cell, and communication arrays across multiple levels.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Persuader (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab ten-wheel-drive laser tank with a Heatwave laser cannon turret and Dart SAM missiles. Low-profile armored hull with wide-set wheels for stability.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Road Toad B.R.V. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab armored battlefield recovery tow truck with a rear-mounted crane arm, towing winch, and heavy-duty bumper. Utilitarian design with enclosed cab and work platform.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: S.L.A.M. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab mobile long-range artillery machine with an elevating missile launcher arm, targeting radar, and tracked base. Fires large strategic missiles from a compact platform.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Dominator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: White and gray Battle Force 2000 arctic assault tank with futuristic angular armor, forward-mounted cannon, and wide treads for snow operations. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Eliminator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue Battle Force 2000 high-speed pursuit vehicle with futuristic styling, aerodynamic body, and forward-mounted weapons. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Marauder (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray Battle Force 2000 attack motorcycle/snowmobile with futuristic cowling, ski runners, and side-mounted weapons. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sky Sweeper (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray Battle Force 2000 anti-aircraft jet with forward-swept wings, dual engines, and air-to-air missiles. Futuristic design that combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Vector (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray Battle Force 2000 advanced interceptor jet with angular futuristic design, twin tail fins, and nose-mounted cannon. Combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Vindicator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray Battle Force 2000 hovering assault platform with ducted fans, weapons pods, and a single operator station. Futuristic hover vehicle that combines with other BF2000 vehicles to form Future Fortress.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Desert Fox 6WD (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Tan and brown six-wheel-drive desert jeep with Scorpion anti-tank missiles, roll cage, and sand-colored camouflage. Open-top design with aggressive desert terrain tires.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mean Dog (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Large olive drab multi-section attack vehicle with detachable front cab, middle weapons platform, and rear missile battery. Three-part design with heavy armament across all sections.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Phantom X-19 (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black stealth fighter jet with angular faceted surfaces, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and under-wing weapons pylons. Based on the conceptual F-19 stealth design with a single-seat cockpit.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: R.P.V. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray remote-piloted unmanned drone with delta wings, hydraulically operated missile rack, and compact jet engine. Autonomous surveillance and attack vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Rolling Thunder (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Large olive drab armored mobile missile launcher on a heavy-duty truck chassis with massive tires, an elevating ICBM-style rocket, and a protected driver cab. One of the larger Joe vehicles.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Skystorm (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab X-wing configuration helicopter with four rotor blade assemblies, nose-mounted gun, side missiles, and under-wing bombs. Unique quad-rotor attack chopper design.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Swampmasher (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab 12-wheeled swamp assault vehicle with four sets of tri-wheeled tracks, elevated driver position, and mounted weapons. Designed for traversing marshland and wetland terrain.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Warthog A.I.F.V. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab amphibious infantry fighting vehicle with an angular armored hull, turret-mounted cannon, and propeller for water operations. Troop carrier with multiple firing ports.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Cat (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the Snow Cat with bold tiger-stripe camouflage pattern. Tracked arctic vehicle with dual missile launchers and enclosed cabin.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Fly (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the Dragonfly helicopter with tiger-stripe camouflage. Twin-engine assault copter with chin gun turrets and rocket pods.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Paw (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the Ferret ATV with tiger-stripe camouflage pattern. Small four-wheeled recon vehicle with forward-mounted weapons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Rat (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the Rattler ground attack jet with tiger-stripe camouflage. Twin-engine A-10-style bomber with under-wing ordnance pylons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Shark (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the Water Moccasin airboat with tiger-stripe camouflage. Fan-propelled swamp boat with forward-mounted guns.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Blaster (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the Cobra Maggot assault tank. Multi-turreted battle vehicle with dual elevated gun pods and dark stealth color scheme.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Raider (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the Triple T assault vehicle. Three-wheeled attack vehicle with dark stealth paint for covert night operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Shade (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the S.H.A.R.C. submersible craft. Streamlined underwater assault vehicle with dark stealth coloring for covert aquatic operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Storm (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the Persuader laser tank. Ten-wheel-drive vehicle with laser cannon and dark stealth color scheme for night operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Striker (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the Killer W.H.A.L.E. hovercraft. Large armed assault hovercraft with dark stealth paint for covert naval operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Arctic Blast (ARAH Toy)
data.description: White and light blue arctic assault vehicle with a rotating missile launcher turret, ski runners, and enclosed heated cabin. Designed for cold weather combat operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Crusader (ARAH Toy)
data.description: White space shuttle with detachable Avenger scout craft. Features cargo bay doors, landing gear, and orbital maneuvering engines. Two-piece space vehicle set for orbital missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Devastator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab one-man walking battlefield robot with four articulated legs, forward-mounted weapons, and an enclosed cockpit pod. Mech-style walker design.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mudfighter (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab and brown ground attack aircraft with a tandem two-seat cockpit, under-wing bombs, and a rugged low-altitude design. Built for close air support missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Radar Rat (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Small olive drab motorized battlefield surveillance robot with a rotating radar dish, compact tracked chassis, and sensor array. Autonomous reconnaissance drone.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Raider (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab four-track assault vehicle with dual caterpillar tread units, elevated gunner position, and forward-mounted heavy cannon. Armored crew compartment with multiple weapon stations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Thunderclap (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab three-component mobile assault platform with a tractor unit, trailer-mounted blaster cannon, and detachable Annihilator cannon base. Multi-section artillery system.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tri-Blaster (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab one-man walking battlefield robot with triple-barreled pulse fire laser cannon, four-wheel drive, and compact cockpit. Small mech with heavy forward firepower.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Fish (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the Devilfish attack boat with tiger-stripe camouflage. High-speed assault boat with twin jet motors and mounted weapons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Tiger Sting (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Yellow and black Tiger Force repaint of the VAMP Mark II with tiger-stripe camouflage. Upgraded 4x4 jeep with missile launcher and removable roof.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Boomer (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the Skystriker combat jet. Variable-sweep-wing supersonic fighter with dark stealth color scheme for covert air operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Ray (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the Cobra Moray hydrofoil. Armed attack hydrofoil with dark stealth paint scheme for nighttime naval assault.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Night Scrambler (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and dark gray Night Force repaint of the APC personnel carrier. Amphibious troop transport with dark stealth color scheme for covert insertion missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Pulverizer (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray Battle Force 2000 heavy assault tank with futuristic angular armor, rotating turret, and heavy-duty treads. Designed for frontline armored warfare.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Equalizer (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Green and brown Slaughter's Marauders armored vehicle with dual cannons, camouflage paint scheme, and heavy-duty wheels. Compact assault vehicle for the Marauders sub-team.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Lynx (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Green and brown Slaughter's Marauders light reconnaissance vehicle with camouflage paint, forward-mounted weapons, and compact four-wheeled chassis.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Armadillo (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Green and brown Slaughter's Marauders mini-tank with camouflage paint, small turret-mounted gun, and compact tracked chassis. Light armored vehicle for scouting missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Avalanche (ARAH Toy)
data.description: White and blue arctic assault vehicle with detachable scout craft, ice mine deployer, pulse cannon, and heat-seeking missiles. Large multi-purpose arctic operations vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: General (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab mobile strike headquarters vehicle with an integrated Locust mini-helicopter on the rear deck. Large multi-role command vehicle with communications equipment and weapons stations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Hammer (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab armored Humvee-style vehicle with a rotational gun turret, high-impact pulse cannon, and quick-slide rear hatches. Sturdy four-wheeled military transport.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Locust (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Small olive drab one-man attack helicopter with a single rotor, air-to-air missiles, and compact fuselage. Light scout chopper also included with the General vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mobile Battle Bunker (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab armored mobile fortress on tracks with double-barreled mortar cannons, hidden missile rack, and heavy defensive plating. Rolling bunker with multiple crew positions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Retaliator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab attack helicopter with a main rotor, tail rotor, rocket pods, chin gun, and tandem two-seat cockpit. Mid-size combat chopper for assault missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sky Havoc (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Chrome and silver Sky Patrol repaint of the H.A.V.O.C. with reflective metallic finish. Multi-section articulated assault vehicle with elevated gun turrets and chrome detailing.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sky Hawk (Sky Patrol) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Chrome and silver Sky Patrol repaint of the Sky Hawk VTOL with reflective metallic finish. One-man vertical takeoff aircraft with chrome accents and weapons.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sky Raven (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Chrome and silver Sky Patrol repaint of the Night Raven spy plane with reflective metallic finish. Supersonic reconnaissance jet without the drone component.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Sky S.H.A.R.C. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Chrome and silver Sky Patrol repaint of the S.H.A.R.C. submersible craft with reflective metallic finish. Streamlined attack submarine with chrome detailing.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Attack Cruiser (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue river patrol attack boat with mines, missiles, and a launchable attack glider on the stern. Multi-weapon naval assault craft with enclosed pilot cabin.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Badger (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab all-track armored vehicle with radial tires, tow hook, and auto-fire missile launcher. Compact assault vehicle with rugged off-road capability.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Battle Wagon (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab motorized armored assault truck with detachable missile launcher, twelve missiles, and heavy-duty suspension. Large rugged combat transport.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Brawler (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab armored 4x4 with detachable grenades, rooftop missile launcher, and removable hatch cover. Compact combat vehicle with aggressive styling.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Battle Copter (Joe) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab pull-string powered helicopter with functional spinning rotors for actual flight capability. Compact single-seat chopper with mounted missiles.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Air Commandos Glider (Skymate) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab unpowered stealth assault glider with fixed delta wings, pull-string launcher mechanism, and single-seat open cockpit. Lightweight air insertion vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Air Commandos Glider (Cloudburst) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab unpowered stealth assault glider with fixed swept wings, pull-string launcher, and single-seat open cockpit. Silent-approach air insertion craft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Barracuda (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray one-man attack submarine with three torpedoes, movable stabilizer fins, and baking soda-powered diving action. Streamlined submersible for underwater assault missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Headquarters (1992) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab fold-up portable command base with collapsible towers, electronic battle sounds, missile launchers, removable bunker, fuel station, and movable elevator. Updated headquarters playset.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Patriot (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab armored missile launcher transport with a large elevating rocket on a truck chassis. Heavy-duty military missile vehicle with enclosed cab.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Storm Eagle (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray advanced tactical fighter jet with water-shooting capability, four missiles, rear landing gear, and swept-wing design. Futuristic single-seat combat aircraft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Liquidator (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray water-shooting advanced tactical fighter jet with four missiles and sleek delta-wing design. One-piece construction combat aircraft with water-squirting action feature.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Battle Copter (Ace) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab pull-string powered helicopter with functional spinning rotors for actual flight. Compact attack chopper with mounted weapons, packaged with Ace pilot.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Air Commandos Glider (Spirit) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab unpowered stealth assault glider with fixed wings, pull-string launcher, and single-seat open cockpit. Lightweight silent insertion glider.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Eco Striker (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Bright green and yellow Eco-Warriors water-shooting recast of the A.W.E. Striker. Open-top 4x4 with color-change battle damage feature and water cannon for decontamination missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Desert Apache (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Tan and brown desert-camouflage attack helicopter with electronic battle sounds, 30mm chin gun, turbo-shaft thruster, and Sonic Fighters sound effects. Desert operations combat chopper.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Fort America (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab transforming mobile fortress that converts from combat tank mode into a battle fortress with missile launchers and electronic battle sounds. Dual-mode Sonic Fighters vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ghoststriker X-16 (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gray stealth attack jet with angular faceted surfaces, twin engines, under-wing missiles, and a single-seat cockpit with canopy. Advanced low-observable combat aircraft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Mudbuster (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab all-terrain 4x4 battle truck with smash-and-bash bumper, 360-degree rotating missile launcher, and puncture-proof oversized tires. Rugged off-road combat vehicle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Shark 9000 (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue armed assault hydroplane with stepped hull, forward-mounted guns, and a single-seat open cockpit. High-speed water attack craft.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Monster Blaster A.P.C. (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Green and purple Mega Marines heavy troop transporter with Lock 'n Load missile launcher, four heat-seeking missiles, and puncture-proof tires. Holds up to 17 figures.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Starfighter (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Silver and blue Star Brigade space attack fighter with spring-fired launcher, swept wings, and futuristic cockpit. Designed for orbital combat missions.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Armor-Bot (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Silver and blue Star Brigade powered exo-armor suit with articulated limbs, cockpit chest hatch, and mounted heavy weapons. Humanoid mech suit for space combat.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Ninja Lightning (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and red Ninja Force high-speed attack motorcycle with sleek aerodynamic fairings, side-mounted weapons, and single-rider design. Stealth combat cycle.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Pile Driver (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Black and gold Ninja Force rapid-assault tornado attack vehicle with spinning weapon mechanism, single-seat cockpit, and martial arts-themed design.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Blockbuster (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Olive drab heavily armored assault vehicle with double-barreled pom-pom cannon, ten-shot auto-feeding rocket chamber, anti-aircraft gun, and front-mounted Gatling gun. Bristling with firepower.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Razor-Blade (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray zip-line helicopter that glides along a string between two handles. Features spinning rotors and a figure rescue backpack. Action-feature focused design.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Manta-Ray (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Gray and blue armed attack raft with hydrofoil capability, mounted weapons, and compact hull. Small fast-attack watercraft for naval assault operations.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero

data.name: Power Fighter (Joe) (ARAH Toy)
data.description: Silver and blue Star Brigade robotic battle armor exo-suit with articulated limbs, weapons mount, and pilot cockpit. Large humanoid mech for space warfare.
data.source_name: G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero
